issues.title: Back links with Postgres (immutability + tombstones)
issues.body:
## Problem
Links live in an in-memory dict and are lost on restart.

## Acceptance
- links table; code immutable; delete -> 410 Gone

_Source: SPEC.md §2 Storage_

<!-- backlog-id: postgres-persistence -->
<!-- DEPS_PLACEHOLDER -->

issues.title: Support custom aliases with 409 on collision
issues.body:
## Problem
No alias field; collisions unhandled.

## Acceptance
- POST /shorten {url, alias}; 409 on collision

_Source: SPEC.md §1 Shorten & resolve_

<!-- backlog-id: custom-aliases -->
<!-- DEPS_PLACEHOLDER -->

issues.title: Add per-IP and per-key rate limits (resolve exempt)
issues.body:
## Problem
No rate limiting; shorten is unbounded.

## Acceptance
- anon 10/h/IP, authed 1000/h/key, GET /:code exempt

_Source: SPEC.md §3 Rate limiting_

<!-- backlog-id: rate-limiting -->
<!-- DEPS_PLACEHOLDER -->
